items.reason: Adds core LogSampler unit coverage for derivation, normalization, invalid config retention, hash-threshold decisions, distribution, fatal bypass, disabled fast path, and concurrent hot-path reads.
Covers proto config application, boundary ppm validation, disabled/enabled transitions, previous-good retention, PopulateConfigProto, and no-arg request sampling behavior.
Covers access/client/request-out sampling decisions, request sampled-in forcing, sampled-out drops, logSampled markers, and access-log formatting/layout behavior.
Exercises LOG/PLOG/VLOG integration, fatal/check bypass, diagnostic supplement sampling, request rejection, and background-log bypass with payload side-effect checks.
Covers the new AccessRecorder facades, deferred providers, sampled-out provider skipping, async/shared lifetime patterns, key truncation, embedded NULs, and field overwrite behavior.
Updates performance-sensitive coverage for 4000 QPS sampler paths, pass-through macro overhead, rejected payload avoidance, access sampled-in/out latency, and sampler-only decision cost.
Updates RPC metadata propagation tests from LogRateLimiter to LogSampler, including disabled/undecided, full-rate, zero-rate reject, and worker-local sampling decisions.
Adds system coverage for cross-process sampling consistency and worker-to-client sampler config delivery through client connection flows.
The PR adds transactional sampler flag handling in Flags::UpdateFlagParameter, but this changed test only alters indentation and does not cover sampler flag commit, validation failure, or rollback.
